inputs.label: Total Units Started
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units that entered the production process.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units that entered the production process.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim sürecine giren toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Einheiten, die in den Produktionsprozess eingegangen sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités entrées dans le processus de production.

inputs.label: Good Units (First Pass)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units that passed quality inspection on the first attempt without rework.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units that passed quality inspection on the first attempt without rework.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden işleme gerek kalmadan ilk denemede kalite kontrolünden geçen birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten, die die Qualitätsprüfung beim ersten Versuch ohne Nacharbeit bestanden haben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités ayant passé le contrôle qualité dès la première tentative sans reprise.

inputs.label: Reworked Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of units that required rework to meet quality standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units that required rework to meet quality standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite standartlarını karşılamak için yeniden işleme gerektiren birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten, die nachgearbeitet werden mussten, um die Qualitätsstandards zu erfüllen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités ayant nécessité une reprise pour atteindre les normes de qualité.

inputs.label: Scrap Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of units that were scrapped or deemed irreparable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units that were scrapped or deemed irreparable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hurda veya onarılamaz olarak değerlendirilen birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten, die verschrottet oder als irreparabel eingestuft wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités mises au rebut ou jugées irréparables.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
